title: PIREX Optimum Glass Rectangular Roaster High Resistance Easy Grip, Multicolor, 39x25 cm (Pack of 1)
features: PIREX Rectangular Pan Optimum with two handles 39x25 cm kitchen item
Borosilicate glass: 100% natural and hygienic material, ideal for cooking in the oven up to 300 °.
Deep sides: less likely food will spill in the oven during cooking, large handles: easy to grasp when taking out, even with oven mitts
Hygienic BPA-free material that does not retain stains or odors
Dishwasher safe and scratch resistant, microwave safe
description: Product Description Pyrex, a committed French brand! At Pyrex, we are committed to a free and uninhibited style of cooking, free from codes of perfection. For over 100 years, our Pyrex cookware and storage containers have been inspired by a love of French cuisine. Our commitment is to develop and produce healthy and durable glass products in our French factory, suitable for a wide range of uses! Previous page A dish to suit every situation! Discover our wide range of Pyrex oven dishes to suit all your kitchens! Scratch resistant Can be cut directly inside the dish without damaging it Dishwasher safe Hygienic material that won't accumulate stains or odours Easy to wash Cook and reheat Oven and microwave safe Deep dish for easy cooking Easy to use Gigognables for optimised storage Withstands temperatures from -40°C to +300°C Serve on the table Next page 1 Discover our roasters 2 Scratch resistant 3 Easy to wash 4 Cook and reheat 5 Easy to use Discover our roasters ! 3 Glass Oven Dishes 8 pax Add To Basket 2 lasagnas glass dishes Add To Basket 4 Glass Oven Dishes 10 px Add To Basket 3 Glass Oven Dishes 6 pax Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 5,328 4.8 out of 5 stars 878 4.9 out of 5 stars 46 4.8 out of 5 stars 217 Price £25.89 £ 25 . 89 £23.94 £ 23 . 94 £34.49 £ 34 . 49 £26.89 £ 26 . 89 Wide handles ✔ ✘ ✔ ✔ Deep dish ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Scratch resistance ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Airfryer safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Oven safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Microwave safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Dishwasher safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Freeze & Fridge safe ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Reusable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Pyrex Borosilicate glass ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Made in France ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Ideal for Family 4 - 6 pax & friends Lasagnas fans Big family & friends First equipment The video showcases the product in use. A COMMITMENT MADE TO LAST Sustainable products We are committed to bringing the highest quality cookware to every home in the world. Preserving our environment Our aim is to continually reduce our CO2 emissions, improve waste management and minimise our footprint on the planet. French manufacturing Pyrex glass has been made in France since 1970, symbolising the excellence of the French glass industry thanks to unrivalled expertise. Stop food waste! At Pyrex, we fight food waste with the conviction that food that is better preserved and consumed is also food that is thrown away less. Previous page Next page
